返回日报
Hacker News #2

欧盟境内销售的每一辆新车都必须配备驾驶员监测摄像头。

Every new car sold in the European Union must include a driver monitoring camera

硬件 作者 nickslaughter02 热度 722 回复 932 2026/07/08 04:50
打开原帖 打开外部链接 JSON

摘要

  • 欧盟规定所有新售车辆必须配备驾驶员监控摄像头系统
  • 该法规旨在通过技术手段减少因分心驾驶导致的交通事故
  • 引发关于车载监控设备普及与隐私保护的广泛讨论

看点

  • 欧盟强制立法推动车载监控硬件普及
  • 驾驶员监控系统（DMS）技术成为车企标配
  • 隐私保护与道路安全之间的平衡引发争议
  • HN社区高热度讨论，回复数超过900条
  • 对汽车电子硬件供应链产生潜在影响

欧盟强制要求新车配备驾驶员监控摄像头，涉及车载硬件、传感器技术及隐私安全议题，与科技产品和硬件相关。

正文翻译

暂无正文

暂无原文

回复翻译 20

dvratil 2026/07/08 18:46
我有时想知道这些系统是如何在道路上进行测试的，以及测试驾驶员是否有任何反馈，或者有哪些白痴在阅读反馈时说“这完全没问题，完全符合预期”...

我的车有自适应巡航控制系统，会根据限速标志自动调整速度。我在高速公路上以 130 公里/小时的速度行驶，汽车在出口路肩上看到了 60 公里/小时的限速标志（已经被混凝土屏障与高速公路隔开，因此从技术上讲，这是一条完全不同的道路），并开始快速制动 - 我差一点就被后面的司机追上，他（理所当然）没想到我会在前面什么都没有的情况下突然开始制动。幸运的是，它可以永久关闭，这样我就可以继续使用巡航控制，而不必害怕每一个限速标志。

最近我租了一辆斯柯达卡罗克（很新的，可能是 2024/2025 年），它甚至不根据标志调整巡航控制速度，而是可能根据内置地图的数据？我不知道 - 但它会随机决定我在 90 公里/小时的道路上行驶时进入 20 公里/小时的区域。而且这个功能无法关闭。所以我完全关闭了巡航控制，因为天哪，怎么会有人认为这可以改善道路安全？

编辑：拼写错误

I sometimes wonder how these systems are being tested on the road and whether there's any feedback from the test drivers, or what kind of morons are there saying "this is completely fine, exactly like intended" when they read the feedback...

My car has adaptive cruise control and will automatically adjust speed based on speed limit signs. I was on a highway at 130km/h and the car read a 60km/h speed limit sign that was on an exit shoulder (already separated by a concrete barrier from the highway, so technically a different road altogether) and started breaking really fast - I was pretty close from getting tailgated by the driver behind me, who did not (rightfully) expect me to suddenly start breaking with nothing in front of me. Luckily this can be permanently turned off, so I can continue using cruise control without being afraid of every single speed limit sign.

Recently I had rented a Skoda Karoq (very new one, probably 2024/2025) which adjusted the cruise control speed not even based on signs, but probably based on data from built-in maps? I don't know - but it would randomly decide that I entered a 20km/h zone while driving on a 90km/h road. And this couldn't be turned off. So I just turned off cruise control completely, because wtf, how can anyone think this is improving road safety?

Edit: typo

楼层
randerson 2026/07/08 22:24
我的汽车（来自大众集团）配备了主动车道保持功能。它会检测到您何时偏离车道并引导您返回车道。理论上听起来不错。

除了在美国，如果您在正确的车道上行驶，那么每次有出口时，它都会主动引导您驶向车道和出口之间的混凝土中间带。我不明白这个功能是如何签署的。在我看来，风险大于收益。

My car (from VW Group) came with Active Lane Keep. It detects when you're drifting out of your lane and steers you back into it. Sounds great in theory.

Except that in the US, if you're cruising in the right lane then every time there's an exit it will actively steer you towards the concrete median between the lane and the exit. I don't understand how this feature was signed off on. The risks outweigh the benefits, in my opinion.

楼层
laughing_man 2026/07/08 23:47
我永远不会购买具有该功能的汽车，除非我可以将其关闭。 如果我需要在紧急情况下转向，我不需要与我的车战斗。
I will never buy a car with that feature unless I can turn it off. I don't need the be fighting my car if I need to swerve in an emergency situation.
楼层
psadauskas 2026/07/09 00:07
几年前我租了一辆车，我想是某种吉普车（我没有选它），有这个功能。在高速公路上行驶时，如果我旁边的车道上有一辆车，我倾向于移至车道的另一侧以腾出更多空间，尤其是在弯道处。这辆车有车道保持功能，会和我争夺方向盘，迫使我不舒服地靠近其他车，当你在陌生的环境中以 70 英里/小时的车流量驾驶一辆陌生的车时，这尤其令人恼火。

我只花了大约 5 分钟就退出并查找如何禁用它，而且每次启动汽车时都必须在菜单中禁用它，没有办法让它被禁用永久的。

现在，每当我租车时，我都拒绝接受克莱斯勒或大众的任何东西。

I rented a car a couple years ago, I think a Jeep of some sort (I didn't pick it), that had this feature. When driving on the highway, if there's a car in the lane next to me, I tend to move over to the other side of my lane to give more room, especially around curves. This car had lane-keeping, and would fight with me for the steering wheel, and force me uncomfortably close to the other cars, which is particularly infuriating when you're driving an unfamiliar car in an unfamiliar environment in heavy traffic at 70mph.

It only took about 5 minutes of that before I exited and looked up how to disable it, and it has to be disabled in the menus every time you start the car, there's no way to have it be permanent.

Now whenever I rent a car, I refuse to be given anything from Chrysler or VW.

楼层
doubled112 2026/07/09 00:30
我的丰田有一个_启用_车道保持按钮。 事情应该是这样的。
My Toyota has a button to _enable_ lane keeping. This is how it should be.
楼层
jawilson2 2026/07/09 00:50
我的路虎卫士也有这个问题。
My Land Rover Defender has this as well.
楼层
zwckl 2026/07/08 19:56
我驾驶的是大众 ID3，它也有同样的问题。真是令人费解。有些道路会让我绊倒并猛踩刹车：在格林威治的 A2（英国伦敦的 50 英里/小时的道路）上，它会突然认为现在是 30 英里/小时，而在 M6 北行（英国伯明翰的 70 英里/小时的道路）上，它的速度会降至 50 英里/小时。据我所知，没有任何迹象表明摄像头可能会误读。

有一次，它认为限制已更改为 100 英里/小时，而这在英国甚至都不是明确的速度限制。

I drive a Volkswagen ID3 and it has the same issue. It's baffling. There are certain roads that trip it up for me and make it slam on the brakes: the A2 in Greenwich (a 50mph road in London UK) it'll suddenly think it's now 30mph, and on the M6 Northbound (70mph road in Birmingham, UK) it drops to 50mph. As far as I can see, there are no signs anywhere that the camera can misread.

On one occasion it thought the limit had changed to 100mph, which isn't even a defined speed limit in the UK.

楼层
11mariom 2026/07/08 20:35
很高兴我有一辆稍旧的车，其中“自适应巡航控制”意味着与我前面的车保持距离。仅此而已。

有时我会看一些新车的评论，大量的蜂鸣声、中央屏幕上的通讯等等……让我不知所措。观看视频。无法想象在那种条件下开车。

Glad I have slightly older car where 'adaptive cruise control' means keeping distance from car in front of me. Nothing more.

Sometimes I watch some reviews of newer cars, and numbers of beeping, comms on central screen, etc is just… overwhelming me. Watching video. Cannot imagine driving in that conditions.

楼层
Tade0 2026/07/08 18:59
我很高兴之前租用的 Karoq 无法激活巡航控制系统。 VAG 界面总是让我感到困惑，这种行为更是如此。

我一直看到这样的标志被识别，所以使用卫星导航作为我的参考。不幸的是，如果它不是最新的（我的已经好几年了），它会建议与现实无关的速度。

I'm happy I wasn't able to activate cruise control in the Karoq that I rented some time ago. VAG interfaces were always confusing to me and this behaviour would be more so.

I see signs recognized like that all the time, so use satnav as my reference. Unfortunately if it's not up to date (mine hasn't been for years now), it will suggest speeds which have nothing to do with reality.

楼层
silon42 2026/07/08 19:18
我想知道以后是否应该在后窗安装一个弹出式 30 标志，以防止尾随者。
I wonder if I should install a popup 30 sign on a rear window for tailgaters in the future.
楼层
psd1 2026/07/08 22:35
不错的想法，但试试镜子。大多数灵长类动物无法识别自己的倒影，而它们所表现出的威胁信号会让它们退缩。
Good thinking, but try a mirror. The majority of primate species don't recognise their own reflection, and the threat signals they display make them back off.
楼层
yomismoaqui 2026/07/08 22:39
但接着你又会面临清理那面镜子上粪便的问题。
But then you have the problem of cleaning the feces from that mirror.
楼层
Tade0 2026/07/08 20:07
我也很好奇，但恐怕他们不会使用这样的系统，因为他们也保持距离和速度。
I'm curious as well, but I'm afraid they don't use such systems due to how they also keep distance as well as speed.
楼层
karlosvomacka 2026/07/08 20:21
我有一辆宝马，它可以读取路标，然后它会提示您是否要将自适应巡航控制系统重新调整到新的速度。比大众汽车更好的系统。
i have a bmw that read the road signs and then it prompts you if you'd like to readjust your adaptive cruise control to the new speed. Much better system than in VW cars.
楼层
quietsegfault 2026/07/08 21:10
我在美国有一辆韩国 SUV，我很少被注意警报打扰。当我在的时候，我很明显没有注意，并温柔地提醒我别再犯傻了，要注意！我喜欢在我的车上实施。
I have a Korean SUV in the US, and I am rarely bothered by the attention alert. When I am, I’m very clearly not paying attention, and reminded gently to stop being a fool and pay attention! I like the implementation in my vehicle.
楼层
A_D_E_P_T 2026/07/08 05:00
所有新车。

此时我不知道是否会购买 2008 年之后制造的任何东西。每当我在这里（欧盟）租一辆新车时，我都会发现它们非常烦人。 最糟糕的是巡航控制系统试图遵守速度限制——但它的传感器并不总是能很好地读取标志，所以你经常会无缘无故地减慢到 50 公里/小时（约 30 英里/小时）。 然后还有不断向你发出嘟嘟声、你无法关闭的“车道辅助”（看着你，大众汽车）以及许多其他小烦恼。 摄像头对着你的脸只会雪上加霜。

All new cars.

At this point I don't know if I'd buy anything made after 2008. Whenever I rent a new car around here (in the EU) I find them very annoying. The worst is the cruise control that tries to stick to the speed limit -- but its sensors don't always read the signs very well, so you'll often slow to 50 km/h (about 30 mph) for no reason. Then there's the incessant beeping at you, "lane assist" that you can't turn off (looking at you, Volkswagen,) and many more small annoyances. A camera pointed at your face just adds insult to injury.

楼层
peterlk 2026/07/08 05:11
圣诞节期间，我花了几分钟尝试调试我的蜂鸣仪表板 - 它似乎只在开车时有时会发生，所以停下来并没有让我弄清楚。最终我发现它在对我发出嘟嘟声，因为我的眼睛没有足够关注路面。当然，要弄清楚这一点，我需要将视线从道路上移开，找出与该特定警报相关的闪烁信号。

此外，不断有人警告我在农村地区超速，汽车错过了限速标志，导致我在开车几个小时内开始忽略超速警报。

我觉得这里有一些教训，可以帮助人们建立最低的共同标准，并为人们提供产品而不是工具（工具更危险，但更有效）有用），但也许我只是脾气暴躁。

Over Christmas, I spent several minutes trying to debug my beeping dashboard - it only seemed to happen sometimes while driving, so stopping didn’t let me figure it out. Eventually I discovered that it was beeping at me because my eyes weren’t on the road enough. Of course, figuring that out required me to take my eyes off the road to figure out which blinking signal was associated with this particular alarm.

Also, being constantly warned that I was speeding in rural areas where the car missed a speed limit sign caused me to start ignoring the speeding alarm within a few hours of driving the car.

I feel like there’s some lesson here in building to the lowest common denominator, and giving people products rather than tools (tools are more dangerous, but more useful), but maybe I’m just grumpy.

楼层
frereubu 2026/07/08 10:22
> 另外，我经常被警告说我在农村地区超速，汽车错过了限速标志，这导致我在开车几个小时内开始忽略超速警报。

许多这些功能似乎假设您在车道标记清晰的多车道高速公路上行驶。在乡村道路上，我的 ID.3 不断地以某种方式推动着我。您可以将其关闭，但下次您解锁汽车时它会自行重新打开。

> Also, being constantly warned that I was speeding in rural areas where the car missed a speed limit sign caused me to start ignoring the speeding alarm within a few hours of driving the car.

A lot of these features seem to assume that you're driving on a multi-lane motorway with well-marked lanes. I'm constantly being nudged by my ID.3 one way or another on rural roads. You can turn it off, but it turns itself back on the next time you unlock the car.

楼层
vincnetas 2026/07/08 15:39
你可以使用OBD2适配器将车道辅助的默认设置更改为默认关闭（在车辆启动后），还有很多其他替你决定的设置，感觉就像你开的不是自己的车而是租来的车一样。比如每次启动汽车后空调总是重置为22度。真该死，我就想开20度。让我启动汽车时保持这个温度不行吗。
You can use OBD2 dongle to change default setting of lane assist to be off by default (after car starts) And many more setting that are decided for you as if you were using a rental car not your own. Like always reseting air conditioner to 22C after starting a car. God dammit i want 20C. Let it stay like that when i start a car.
楼层
psd1 2026/07/08 23:08
> 你可以使用OBD2适配器更改车道辅助的默认设置

对此我持怀疑态度。OBDII只是一种协议，它对你总线上的模块一无所知。我想你会发现你需要经销商的软件。市面上确实有一些工具能实现大部分功能，但由于它们是基于逆向工程构建的，价格反正也接近经销商软件了。

我找到奔驰软件的唯一地方是一个隐藏了链接的付费论坛。让破解版运行起来简直像念咒语一样玄乎。大众集团的情况也类似。如果你不是经销商，他们不会把软件卖给你。

靠eBay上40英镑的廉价货是搞不定这些的。如果你能做到，请分享有效的方法，很多人都会非常感兴趣。

> You can use OBD2 dongle to change default setting of lane assist

Colour me skeptical. ODBII is just a protocol; it knows nothing of the modules on your buses. I think you will find you need the dealer software. Tools exist that implement big chunks of that functionality, but since they are built on reverse-engineering, the price approaches the dealer software anyway.

The only place i found the Mercedes software was a paid forum that obscures the links. Getting the cracks working was a magic incantation. It's similar for VAG. They won't sell you the software if you're not a dealer.

You will not get there with a £40 ebay special. If you can, please share what works, it will be of much interest to many.

楼层
